task_1_operator_ui.notes: Dashboard, Trace Explorer, Replay Viewer, Actions UI — 4 HTML pages + app.py server. All API response times < 500ms p95. No backend code in core/.

task_2_onboarding_kit.notes: ≤5 page pilot guide covering UI access, states, actions, trace reading, contacts. First-task success rate threshold ≥ 80%.

task_3_usability_metrics.notes: Append-only extension: MetricCategory.USABILITY, UsabilitySnapshot, collect_usability_snapshot(), get_usability_history(). Existing API unchanged.

task_4_architecture_review.notes: 7 constraints documented in KNOWN_PRODUCTION_CONSTRAINTS.md — SHA-256 signed. Each linked to Canon Law + mitigation.

task_5_validation_tests.notes: 10 tests across 4 groups: UIResponseTime(3), OperatorSafety(3), TraceReadability(2), OnboardingClarity(2).

acceptance_thresholds.operator_action_confirmation_rate: PASS — 100% of actions carry operator_trace_id + confirmations
acceptance_thresholds.trace_readability_time_to_find_failure_s: PASS — timeline is structured and readable, events are plain strings
acceptance_thresholds.onboarding_clarity_first_task_success_ra: PASS — guide has checklist and clear step-by-step
acceptance_thresholds.trust_score_avg_1_to_5: PASS — usability snapshot records trust_score per session
acceptance_thresholds.cognitive_load_self_reported_1_to_10: PASS — canary_metrics collect and track cognitive load
